content.en:
Ye Tian used all his strength to prop up a door defense means, although this is too careful, but it is better to be careful.

And the same is true of the white-bearded old man.

The two of them came to the building and looked at it.

It is a pyramid-like structure, very large, and there are traces of magic circles on the surface of the building.

"This is not a natural building, it should be a building built by the Eternal Master!" Ye Tian guessed.

The white-bearded old man nodded in agreement, "It was definitely built by an eternal master that we can't imagine, maybe it was to select the inheritor, and it would be nice if it was to obtain the inheritance of such an existence." "

However, he also knew very well that it would be very difficult to obtain the inheritance of such an existence.

The other party's requirements for the inheritor must be very high, after all, being able to come here is equivalent to a test.

And if he hadn't relied on Ye Tian's power, he wouldn't have been able to get here at all, so he felt that he had no hope of obtaining the inheritance here.

It is Ye Tian, who is very likely to obtain the inheritance here.

Of course, this is only speculation at the moment, maybe there is nothing here!

"Let's go inside!"

Ye Tian and the white-bearded old man walked into the building.

In an instant, Ye Tian couldn't sense the existence of the white-bearded old man, the two should belong to two time and space, and they couldn't perceive it.

Ye Tian looked around, and he was in a gray void.

Suddenly, a big character appeared in front of Ye Tian.

The word "enlightenment" is actually composed of countless rules of the Tao, and contains countless mysteries and truths.

Ye Tian took a moment of enlightenment and found that the more he understood, the more things he didn't understand, and the more things he forgot.

"I'm afraid this word is not weaker than the secret of swallowing, could it be that it is a secret technique of swallowing the secret of a grade?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Moreover, he felt that this secret technique seemed to have a slight resemblance to the secret of swallowing, perhaps it was a secret technique created by the same being.

Enlightenment!

Enlightenment!

Enlightenment!

Ye Tian continued to comprehend here, and the years gradually passed.

In the dark, he felt that he only had twenty years of enlightenment at most, and if he couldn't comprehend twenty years of enlightenment, he would never be able to comprehend.

The other side.

The white-bearded old man had a sad face, and he was also contemplating this enlightenment.

What is different from Ye Tian is that he has been enlightened for a period of time, and almost all of them have forgotten, and the more he comprehends, the more irritable he becomes.

He knew very well that this was definitely a secret technique against the sky, and it was the biggest chance in his life, but if he couldn't grasp it, he wouldn't be able to get anything.

The more he tried to figure it out, the more he couldn't.

Before he knew it, a boundary river had passed, and he had nothing to gain.

"There is no hope, even if you comprehend twenty realms and river years, it is impossible to understand this secret art, I don't know if the Endless Lord has any hope of understanding it? However, it is also difficult.~!"

In the blink of an eye, several more years had passed, and the old man with the white beard had given up completely, and he had left the building to look elsewhere, maybe he would find something.

And Ye Tian is still comprehending, and he has gained a lot, and there is still a great hope that he can understand this secret art.

Ye Tian had a feeling that this secret technique might be more precious to him than the secret of swallowing.

Void Zone.

The white-bearded old man and Ye Tian sat together and chatted.

"Endless Lord, are you sure you've understood that secret art?"

The white-bearded old man asked.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian affirmed.

At this time, the white-bearded old man showed a look of envy.

It would be nice if he could also realize that secret art!

After chatting for a while, the white-bearded old man said, "After a while, I'm ready to attack the Eternal Controller realm!"

"Has it already been decided?" Ye Tian said in surprise.

The white-bearded old man nodded: "Well, it has been decided, this time I have also obtained a few treasures in that treasure land that will help to impact the eternal controller, at least it can increase a little hope, plus I myself am probably more than seventy percent sure, if the certainty is high, I don't dare to impact, the longer the time passes, the sharpness is smoothed out, maybe the hope of impact will decrease." Also, I know my situation, and it's hard to keep improving. If it weren't for this treasure land, I'm afraid I would have gone to attack it a long time ago. However, it was not in vain, at least some opportunities were increased. "

"Then help you break through and succeed!"

Ye Tian said.

In the blink of an eye, some years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tianshen had already realized the word for sixteen years.

this day.

Airplanes!!!!

Wuzi suddenly shone brightly, turning into a ray of light that poured into Ye Tian's body, turning into a secret technique.

"The Secret of Enlightenment!"

Ye Tian felt some information from this secret technique, this secret technique is definitely the same as the secret of swallowing, it belongs to the same strong person, and the value of the secret of understanding is higher.

The Secret of Enlightenment can enhance Ye Tian's comprehension, once the Secret of Enlightenment is activated, he can quickly comprehend a path, and he can also quickly create a space-time control technique.

Even controlling one's own space-time supreme body, the secret of understanding can be of unimaginable help.

With the mastery-level physical body ancestor endowment and the secret of enlightenment, Ye Tian is afraid that he has a 100% hope of controlling ten percent of the supreme legendary body in a short period of time and condensing the supreme control body, and then his strength will be raised to an extremely terrifying level.

"It's too big a chance, who is that great being, who can actually create such a secret technique as the secret of swallowing and the secret of understanding!"

Ye Tian secretly exclaimed.

He had already obtained the secret of enlightenment, so he did not linger here, but went out directly.

Seeing Ye Tian's smile, the white-bearded old man knew that Ye Tian had broken through, so he congratulated: "Congratulations to the Endless Lord for obtaining the inheritance!"

"It's just a fluke!"

Ye Tian smiled.

"Endless Lord, I have to let you take me out, or if my clone falls, my assault on the Eternal Master will have to be delayed for a long time. The white-bearded old man said.

Ye Tian nodded, the half-step Eternal Master, or the Peak Legendary Realm Lord, to impact the Eternal Master, must (King Li's) ensure the integrity of the will, and they condense the clone, it is to divide the will core, if the clone falls, it needs to restore the will core, it will take a long time.

They are not as capable of replicating their bodies as Ye Tian, even if they fall, it doesn't matter.

"Let's go, I'll take you out. "

Ye Tian easily took the white-bearded old man out.

After another period of time, several clones of the white-bearded old man all returned to the void area.

He's ready to storm the Eternal Master.

And Ye Tian also knew that the white-bearded old man was going to attack the eternal master, so he came to Xuyang Mountain to protect the white-bearded old man.

However, there are very few people who really know that the white-bearded old man is going to attack the eternal master.

Ye Tian counts as one, and the Lord of the Shaking Mountain counts as one.

Several of the Eternal Masters of the Void may know about it.

Sunrise Mountain.

The white-bearded old man opened the magic circle to prevent interference from the outside world.

Immediately, he began to pound. _
